title: medicago obscura subsp. tornata
intro: Medicago obscura subsp. tornata, also known as annual medick or small bird's-foot trefoil, is a perennial or annual legume plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It contains isoflavones and other compounds with potential medicinal properties, which may help alleviate menopausal symptoms, improve bone density, and reduce the risk of heart disease. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to provide various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. However, more research is needed to confirm the efficacy and safety of Medicago obscura subsp. tornata for medicinal purposes.
